snippets: lated by defined media supplements to regulate stem cell self-renewal, lineage specificity, and cellular differentiation ( 13 ). For example, EGF, R-spondin-1, Noggin, Wnt3a, FGF2, FGF10, A83-01 (a TGF-β inhibitor), and nicotinamide contribute epithelial development and preserve structural organization in PDTOs ( 13 ). Tissue-specific requirements for media formulations are taken into consideration for each tissue.
